summary_text: Drawn to a naturally fit and athletic physique, specifically favoring a lean, toned, and normal fit body type rather than a bulky or overly muscular build. Appreciates a versatile fashion sense, highly attracted to someone who looks equally stunning in traditional Indian ethnic wear as they do in modern Western aesthetics. Values a strong physical presence and graceful posture, seeking someone who carries herself with quiet confidence and effortless visual poise.

Visually drawn to individuals with a fair skin complexion and striking, well-defined facial features. Appreciates a naturally beautiful facial structure with strong aesthetic harmony and highly attractive overall facial characteristics.

Drawn to a visibly fit and athletic build, favoring a healthy, well-proportioned physique with natural thickness over overly skinny or heavy body types. Visually appreciates a toned, active appearance that reflects a commitment to staying in good shape. Prefers a moderate height, specifically in the 5'4" to 5'6" range. Completely open to all skin tones and complexions, prioritizing overall physical fitness and a dynamic, well-maintained aesthetic.

Drawn to a well-groomed, put-together aesthetic, favoring men who take pride in their physical presentation and maintain a polished, neat appearance rather than looking unkempt or shabby. Visually attracted to a height range around 5'9" to 5'10" with a natural, everyday good physique rather than an intensely shredded gym body. Prefers an average to slightly heavier build, explicitly open to a softer physique while avoiding extremes of being too thin or heavily obese. Radiates an approachable, comfortable visual vibe that avoids hyper-masculine or overly macho styling, prioritizing a clean, well-maintained, and effortlessly presentable look.

Drawn to a highly attractive, beautiful aesthetic with a strong preference for very fair skin and a clear, luminous complexion. Visually prefers a fit, athletic build or slim physique, explicitly avoiding heavy or larger body types. Appreciates a well-maintained, physically active appearance that highlights a dedication to fitness and overall health.
